connections.description: Map of connection name to connection data.

database.description: (Optional) The name of the database. Defaults to `mysql_db` if not provided.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius Environment ID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`.

host.description: The host name used to connect to the database. Mapped from the recipe module's output.

password.description: (Required) The administrator password for the MySQL database. Marked `x-radius-sensitive`: Radius encrypts it at rest, redacts it on reads, and exposes it decrypted only to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.password}}`.

port.description: The port number used to connect to the database. Mapped from the recipe module's output (MySQL flexible server uses 3306).

username.description: (Required) The administrator username for the MySQL database. Provided directly on the resource and passed to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.username}}`.

version.description: (Optional) The major MySQL server version in the X.Y format. Assumed to be 8.4 if not specified.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

connections.description: Map of connection name to connection data.

database.description: (Optional) The name of the database. Defaults to `postgres_db` if not provided.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius Environment ID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`.

host.description: The host name used to connect to the database.

initSql.description: (Optional) SQL script mounted into the PostgreSQL container's `/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/` directory and executed whenever PGDATA is empty. With the default ephemeral storage this runs on every pod restart. If a PersistentVolumeClaim is used, the script runs only on the very first startup and subsequent changes to initSql are ignored on existing volumes. Limited to ~1 MiB. Useful for creating tables, indexes, and inserting seed data.

password.description: (Required) The administrator password for the PostgreSQL database. Marked `x-radius-sensitive`: Radius encrypts it at rest, redacts it on reads, and exposes it decrypted only to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.password}}`.

port.description: The port number used to connect to the database.

size.description: (Optional) The size of the PostgreSQL database. Defaults to `S` if not provided.

username.description: (Required) The administrator username for the PostgreSQL database. Provided directly on the resource and passed to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.username}}`.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

With the default ephemeral storage this runs on every pod restart. If a PersistentVolumeClaim is used, the script runs only on the very first startup and subsequent changes to initSql are ignored on existing volumes. Limited to ~1 MiB. Useful for creating tables, indexes, and inserting seed data.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

connections.description: Map of connection name to connection data.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius Environment ID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`.

host.description: (Read Only) The host name used to connect to the cache. Mapped from the recipe module's output.

port.description: (Read Only) The TLS port number used to connect to the cache. Mapped from the recipe module's `port` output (Azure Managed Redis uses 10000).

size.description: (Optional) The size of the Redis cache. Defaults to `S` if not provided. The recipe maps the size onto a concrete cloud SKU.

url.description: (Read Only) The full TLS connection URL (`rediss://:<access-key>@<host>:<port>`) used to connect to the cache, including the access key. Mapped from the recipe module's `primaryConnectionString` output.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

connections.description: Map of connection name to connection data.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius Environment ID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`.

host.description: (Read Only) The host name used to connect to the cache. Mapped from the recipe module's output.

port.description: (Read Only) The TLS port number used to connect to the cache. Mapped from the recipe module's `port` output (Azure Managed Redis uses 10000).

size.description: (Optional) The size of the Redis cache. Defaults to `S` if not provided. The recipe maps the size onto a concrete cloud SKU.

url.description: (Read Only) The full TLS connection URL (`rediss://:<access-key>@<host>:<port>`) used to connect to the cache, including the access key. Mapped from the recipe module's `primaryConnectionString` output.

disableDefaultEnvVars.description: Disables the automatic injection of environment variables from the connected resource's properties.

source.description: Resource ID of the source resource for this connection.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

connections.description: Map of connection name to connection data.

database.description: (Required) The SQL database name to create on the server. Defaults to `appdb` in the sample application.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius Environment ID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`.

host.description: The SQL Server fully qualified domain name. Mapped from the recipe module's `fullyQualifiedDomainName` output.

password.description: (Required) The administrator password for the SQL database. Marked `x-radius-sensitive`: Radius encrypts it at rest, redacts it on reads, and exposes it decrypted only to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.password}}`.

port.description: The SQL Server TCP port. Azure SQL Database listens on 1433.

username.description: (Required) The administrator username for the SQL database. Provided directly on the resource and passed to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.username}}`.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

password.description: (Required) The administrator password for the SQL database. Marked `x-radius-sensitive`: Radius encrypts it at rest, redacts it on reads, and exposes it decrypted only to the recipe as `{{context.resource.properties.password}}`.
